name: Penpower Technology LTD.
summary: Penpower Technology LTD., engages in research and development of devices with built-in intelligent human-machine interface technologies in Taiwan and internationally. The company provides handheld pen scanners and translators, pen scanners and translators for computers, and multilingual dictionary pens; wireless writing pads; embedded memory and digital memo writing pads; touch screen stylus; and business card management, voice, graphic design, and document management solutions. It also offers electronic signature solutions, as well as software services. Penpower Technology LTD. was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.
